creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
When run as root, -o and -g will error if either ID is invalid. When run with -U, install will write to the METALOG without validating the IDs.

e.g. this will error

# install -o missing-user src/file dest/file

but this will succeed, adding a METALOG entry with missing-user

$ install -U -M METALOG -o missing-user src/file dest/file
